ui.title: Supervisor Release
ui.desc: Show all transactions waiting to be released.

data.sql: SELECT C_UNIT_CODE, MODULE, COUNT(TRX) AS TRX FROM (SELECT C_UNIT_CODE, 'IPLC' AS MODULE ,C_MAIN_REF AS TRX FROM EXIMTRX.IPLC_MASTER T1 WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,'EPLC' AS MODULE,  C_MAIN_REF AS TRX FROM EXIMTRX.EPLC_MASTER T2 WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,'EXCO' AS MODULE,  C_MAIN_REF AS TRX FROM EXIMTRX.EXCO_MASTER T3 WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE, 'IMCO' AS MODULE, C_MAIN_REF AS TRX FROM EXIMTRX.IMCO_MASTER T4 WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE, 'GTEE' AS MODULE, C_MAIN_REF AS TRX FROM EXIMTRX.GTEE_MASTER T5 WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P') GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE, MODULE HAVING C_UNIT_CODE = '{{SYS_BUSI_UNIT}}'
